title: Mental Work
seoTitle: Mental Work: Evidence-Graded Protocols for Sleep, Anxiety, Focus
seoTitle_es: Trabajo mental: protocolos con evidencia para sueño, ansiedad y enfoque
description: Anxiety, sleep, focus, burnout, the nervous system. The investigator-grade alternative to the wellness-influencer industrial complex. Every protocol cited. Every claim tested. Receipts only.
description_es: Ansiedad, sueño, foco, burnout, el sistema nervioso. La alternativa con rigor de investigador al complejo industrial de los influencers de bienestar. Cada protocolo citado. Cada afirmación probada. Solo recibos.
imagePrompt: Retrofuturist 1970s cinematic still photograph. Heavy 35mm grain, anamorphic lens flare, kodak ektachrome retro slide aesthetic. The chromatic zone is the ONLY saturated area — everything else is desaturated matte black with deep shadow. No recognizable face. Mysterious investigator-archive aesthetic. Photographic NOT painterly NOT illustrated. A dim 1970s clinical observation chamber dominates 70 percent of the frame in deep desaturated cobalt and matte black. Center: a workbench arrayed with the evidence-base toolkit — three small amber pill bottles labeled MAGNESIUM-GLYCINATE / ASHWAGANDHA / NAC, an open RCT printout circled in red marker showing p<0.001 results, an EEG headset with electrode caps draped beside it, a vintage analog HRV monitor pulsing emerald-green traces. A single brass desk lamp throws an amber pool of light over the items; the rest of the chamber is in deep shadow. The amber-lit workbench + bottles + RCT printout + emerald HRV are the chromatic zone — amber, paper-cream, blood-red ink, emerald green. Mood: All The President's Men + clinical-research retrofuturism.
